title: Molecular markers for taxonomic validation of deep water invertebrates
author: Burns, John
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: File 1: MolecularBarcodeSeqs_forValidation.fasta Molecular markers extracted from transcriptome assemblies for validation of animal taxonomic identification. Files 2-4: 2022-03-29-01_JAB_FALKOR_RNA_1, 2022-03-29-01_JAB_FALKOR_RNA_2, 2022-03-29-01_JAB_FALKOR_RNA_2. TapeStation data for total RNA quality assessment. Identifiers in the Sample Description column are linked to identifiers in the published table, Table 2. RNA and sequence statistics for each specimen, from the manuscript: Transcriptome sequencing of seven deep marine invertebrates
